ModMetaData.name: Kept You Waiting, Huh?
ModMetaData.author: AIvanCP
ModMetaData.description:
Plays a custom sound effect when a pawn joins your colony from outside the map (wanderers, refugees, event-based arrivals, etc.).
Does NOT trigger on in-colony prisoner recruitment or slave emancipation.
Optional (disabled by default in Mod Settings): - Sound when an orbital / comms-console trader contacts your colony. - Sound when a walk-in trader caravan arrives on the map.
Note: tribute caravans (empire) use a different game system and do not trigger the trader sound.
Audio is included. Configure volume and toggles in: Options → Mod Settings → Kept You Waiting, Huh?
